NAME

video.c - Video utility stubs for WASM.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t image_validate_dimensions (size_t width, size_t height)
Validate image dimensions (non-zero, within limits).

Detailed Description

Video utility stubs for WASM.

Definition in file video.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t image_validate_dimensions (size_t width, size_t height)

Validate image dimensions (non-zero, within limits).

Parameters

width Image width to validate
height Image height to validate

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK if valid, ERROR_INVALID_PARAM if invalid

Checks that:

  • Both width and height are non-zero
  • Dimensions don't exceed IMAGE_MAX_WIDTH and IMAGE_MAX_HEIGHT Sets errno with detailed context if validation fails

Definition at line 12 of file video.c.

12                                                                          {
13   if (width > 0 && height > 0 && width <= 10000 && height <= 10000) {
14     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
15   }
16   return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
17 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK, and
  ERROR_INVALID_PARAM.


Referenced by handle_image_frame_packet(), and
    image_new().
